context.description: Student draws/fills in a decision tree diagram. The tree has two levels (depth 2). Root node splits on one variable; second level splits on another variable (only on one branch or both). Leaf nodes show classification outcome. Count notation [recommended][not-recommended] is expected in each leaf.
context.tree_structure: Root (var1, threshold) → left branch (≤): second-level node (var2, threshold2) → leaf1, leaf2. Root right branch (>): leaf3 or second-level node.

item_mapping.B4: Second-level left variable name (if second split on left branch)
item_mapping.B10: Right branch threshold (≤) if second split exists
item_mapping.B11: Right branch threshold (>) if second split exists

credit_rules.full: Names one of the 7 valid features.

WS6_B2.item_label: Root Left Branch Threshold Label (≤ side)

credit_rules.full: Numeric threshold with ≤ operator, appropriate for root variable unit.
credit_rules.partial: Numeric threshold without operator, or operator wrong.

WS6_B2.consistency_check: Must be consistent with WS5 chosen threshold and WS7 rules.

WS6_B3.item_label: Root Right Branch Threshold Label (> side)

credit_rules.full: Same numeric value as B2 but with > operator.
credit_rules.partial: Numeric value inconsistent with B2 but > operator correct.

WS6_B3.consistency_check: Must match B2 value with > operator.

credit_rules.full: Names a valid feature DIFFERENT from the root variable (B1).
credit_rules.partial: Names a valid feature but same as root (would create redundant split).

credit_rules.full: Numeric threshold with ≤ for the second variable, unit-appropriate.
Same value as B5 but > operator.
tavsiye edilebilir or tavsiye edilemez (either is correct — depends on student's data).
credit_rules.zero: Empty or not a classification label.

credit_rules.full: Either a valid classification label (for single-level right branch) or a valid feature name (for two-level right branch).
Numeric threshold with ≤ for the right branch second variable.
credit_rules.zero: Empty (acceptable if right branch is a leaf node, not a split).
Empty (acceptable if right branch terminates at leaf).

WS6_B12.item_label: Count Notation or Leaf Label (right branch leaf 1)
WS6_B12.note: B12 was blank in Sample_Student. This indicates the right sub-tree leaf was left incomplete.

required_checks: all leaf nodes have classification labels
threshold operators are consistent (≤ left, > right)
tree depth >= 2 on at least one branch
tree_structure_validation.cross_ws_consistency: Root feature and threshold should match WS5 chosen threshold. Leaf labels should match WS7 rules.

overall_scoring.full: Complete tree structure with valid features, consistent thresholds, and all leaf nodes labeled. tree_structure field validates correctly.
overall_scoring.partial: Tree partially complete — main structure present but one or more leaves missing (e.g. B12 empty) or count notation missing.
overall_scoring.zero: Tree structure absent or only root node completed.
